answer:
GoHighLevel does not offer a free tier for its platform subscriptions, though it provides a 14-day free trial on all plans [1][2]. Developer API access is gated by your subscription tier rather than being available for free [1].

The $297/month Unlimited plan includes basic API access, while the $497/month Agency Pro plan provides advanced API access [1][2]. Developers building apps for the HighLevel Marketplace can list their own apps for free and implement various pricing models, including free or freemium tiers for their end users [3][4]. To begin, you must maintain an active agency subscription [5].
